ddls:
CREATE TABLE "words" (
  "word_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each word */,
  "word" TEXT /* The word itself */,
  "length" INTEGER /* Length of the word in characters */,
  "n_phon" INTEGER /* Number of phonemes in the word */,
  "aoa" REAL /* Age of acquisition (AoA) of the word */,
  "osc_te" REAL /* Orthographic similarity to other words (token effect) */,
  "osc_ld" REAL /* Orthographic similarity to other words (lexical decision effect) */,
  "psc_te" REAL /* Phonological similarity to other words (token effect) */,
  "psc_ld" REAL /* Phonological similarity to other words (lexical decision effect) */,
  "concr" REAL /* Concreteness of the word */,
  "val" REAL /* Valence of the word */,
  "freq" REAL /* Frequency of the word in a corpus */,
  "old20" INTEGER /* Old20 measure of the word */,
  "snd" REAL /* Sound similarity measure of the word */,
  "morph" INTEGER /* Morphological complexity of the word */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the word */,
  "part_of_speech" TEXT /* Part of speech (e.g., noun, verb) */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the word was first added to the dataset */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the word was last modified */,
  "source_corpus" TEXT /* Source corpus from which the word was extracted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("word_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive, banned) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "word_id" INTEGER /* ID of the word being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the word */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the word was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download, update) */,
  "query_criteria" TEXT /* Query criteria used to access the word */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (e.g., browser) used for the access */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_word_id FOREIGN KEY ("word_id") REFERENCES words ("word_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "word_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change event */,
  "word_id" INTEGER /* ID of the word that was changed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "field_changed" TEXT /* Field that was changed */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the field */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the field */,
  "change_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the change */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the change, if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_word_history_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_word_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_word_history_word_id FOREIGN KEY ("word_id") REFERENCES words ("word_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "word_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., High Frequency, Low Concreteness) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the category */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the category was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the category */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the category was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_word_categories_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_word_categories_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "word_category_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping */,
  "word_id" INTEGER /* ID of the word */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the mapping */,
  "approved_date" TEXT /* Date when the mapping was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_word_category_mapping_word_id FOREIGN KEY ("word_id") REFERENCES words ("word_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_word_category_mapping_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES word_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_word_category_mapping_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
